name: stock-analyst
description: 中国A股交易分析技能。通过内置脚本直接调用 MCP 服务获取实时股票数据，结合 sequential-thinking 对持仓股票进行 buy/sell/hold 决策，提供目标价、止损价、退出计划和风险收益比。
author: alex

dependencies.name: python3
dependencies.description: Python 3 stdlib only (urllib, json, argparse, re, sys)

scripts.name: stock_query.py
scripts.description: Query Chinese A-share stock data via MCP streamable-http
